integrationCapabilities.todo: TODO(news-integration): declare Drive SDK dependency and implement media attachment through Drive references only.
TODO(news-integration): map editor, reviewer, operator, and reader permissions to appbase IAM policy checks.
TODO(news-integration): implement projection rebuild worker and index drift verification.
TODO(news-integration): integrate notification delivery SDK after communication authority is selected.
TODO(news-integration): integrate newsletter delivery with approved communication SDK and quiet-hour policy.
TODO(news-integration): publish privacy-safe warehouse events and retention controls.
TODO(news-integration): implement NewsML-G2 parser, payload hash, source identity, and import job mapping.
TODO(news-integration): implement ninjs 2.x bidirectional mapping and contract fixtures.
TODO(news-integration): implement projection worker, endpoint schema, and cache invalidation.
TODO(news-integration): integrate feed polling, payload hashing, and duplicate suppression.
TODO(news-integration): integrate partner delivery receipts and idempotent retries.
TODO(news-integration): integrate paywall entitlement and metered-access event capture.
TODO(news-integration): integrate cache invalidation and completion tracking.
TODO(news-integration): integrate translation jobs and localization memory updates.
TODO(news-integration): integrate moderation classifier and decision explanation artifacts.
TODO(news-integration): integrate retention and legal-hold policy evaluation.
TODO(news-integration): implement manifest verification, signer capture, and trust snapshot mapping.
